title: Spot Navigation
description: Configuration for the production Spot navigation custom module.

mapImageStreamName.title: Global Map Image Stream
mapImageStreamName.description: Rendered GraphNav global map image used as the display layer.

mapImageMetadataStreamName.title: Global Map Image Metadata Stream
mapImageMetadataStreamName.description: JSON metadata companion for the rendered global map image.

overlayStreamName.title: Waypoint Overlay Stream
overlayStreamName.description: Small JSON overlay stream with waypoint and edge data for the current map.

navStateStreamName.title: Navigation State Stream
navStateStreamName.description: Current GraphNav status and live seed-frame pose.

waypointGotoCommandName.title: Waypoint Goto Command Name
waypointGotoCommandName.description: Command template used for waypoint-first navigation.

gotoPoseCommandName.title: Point Goto Command Name
gotoPoseCommandName.description: Command template used for arbitrary point navigation.

cancelNavCommandName.title: Cancel Navigation Command Name
cancelNavCommandName.description: Command template used to override active navigation and hold the current localized pose.

returnAndDockCommandName.title: Return And Dock Command Name
returnAndDockCommandName.description: Command template used to return to dock.

undockCommandName.title: Undock Command Name
undockCommandName.description: Command template used to undock the robot.

showWaypointLabels.title: Show Waypoint Labels
showWaypointLabels.description: Render waypoint labels on the map.

defaultYawMode.title: Default Point Heading
defaultYawMode.description: Initial heading for new point selections before the operator changes it.

defaultYawDeg.title: Fixed Default Heading (deg)
defaultYawDeg.description: Used when Default Point Heading is fixed.
